items.title: 3 Contrarian "Buy the Dip" Picks—and One Area to Avoid
items.description: Jeff Clark of TradeSmith discusses contrarian setups in oversold software, discounted Bitcoin, and Albertsons as rotation hits former leaders—plus why gold miners may be due for a pullback.

items.title: This Datacenter REIT Could Double as Hyperscalers Spend $500 Billion in 2026
items.description: Equinix has a bold strategy to build out more data center capacity.

items.title: There's a Rout in Tech Stocks. What's Going On?
items.description: Investor concerns about the impact of AI are growing.

items.title: Tech’s AI Push Risks a Bond Market Blowback: Credit Weekly
items.description: Microsoft Corp., Oracle Corp. and other “hyperscalers” are in an arms race to invest in AI and beat competitors in a technology that could change vast parts of the economy.  Google parent Alphabet Inc. said it’s poised to spend as much as $185 billion on data centers this year, more than it has invested in the past three years combined.  Amazon.com Inc. promised an even bigger outlay: $200 billion.

items.title: AI leaders argue software will adapt – not die – but valuations are stretched
items.description: Major tech companies lost $1 trillion in a market sell-off this week, sending chills across tech industry. However, I unicorn founders believe valuations will normalize.
